description: Balanced infrastructure resilience across continuity redundancy recovery adaptation equity and cascade risk.
Prioritizes maintaining essential service under disruption.
Prioritizes backup pathways reserve capacity and single-point-failure reduction.
Prioritizes rapid restoration of minimum and full service.
Prioritizes capacity to revise design operations and standards as conditions change.
Prioritizes service continuity and restoration for vulnerable users and historically underserved places.
Prioritizes penalties for cross-system dependencies and cascading exposure.
